message:
fix(server): prevent command processing during blocking operations

Fix race condition in blocked client handling:
- Skip command processing while client is in blocked state (BLPOP/BRPOP/
  BZPOPMIN/BZPOPMAX/BRPOPLPUSH) to prevent buffer overflow from
  pipelined commands arriving during the blocking wait
- After unblocking, process any pipelined commands remaining in
  read_buf before returning to the event loop

This prevents scenarios where a client pipelines additional commands
immediately after a blocking command, which would previously be
processed out of order or cause buffer corruption.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
